channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tamil Nadu CM Stalin raises concerns on women’s quota and outlines welfare schemes ahead of elections
item.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M K Stalin on Sunday criticised the BJP-led Union government for attempting to reduce the state’s political representation under the guise of introducing a women’s reservatio...

item.title: Trump claims Iran talks in Islamabad show limited progress amid nuclear deadlock
item.description: United States President Donald Trump stated on Sunday that Iranian delegates 'haven’t left the bargaining table' after marathon talks between Washington and Tehran in Islamabad ended without any agree...

item.title: Registrar of Companies Dissolves Over 1,000 Non-Compliant Firms in April 2026
item.description: In a major regulatory move, Kenya's Registrar of Companies has removed more than 1,000 firms from the official business register in April 2026. The action targeted companies that either applied volunt...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs must maintain focus despite four-game winning streak, says Cedric Kaze
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs co-coach Cedric Kaze has emphasised the need for the team to stay focused despite their recent four-game winning streak in the Betway Premiership. The victory against TS Galaxy marked th...

item.title: US announces blockade of Strait of Hormuz following unsuccessful Iran negotiations
item.description: US President Donald Trump has declared that the US Navy will initiate a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz in response to unsuccessful peace negotiations with Iran. Talks held in Islamabad over the week...

item.title: Environmental Challenges of Vegan Leather: Durability and Pollution Concerns
item.description: Vegan leather is increasingly marketed as a sustainable and animal-friendly alternative to traditional leather, often showcased in luxury fashion stores and car showrooms. While it avoids animal produ...

item.title: Fire in midtown London, Ontario contained with no injuries reported
item.description: A fire broke out on Sunday afternoon in midtown London, Ontario, prompting a swift response from local fire crews. According to officials, the incident occurred around early afternoon, shortly before ...

item.title: A Guide to 20 Timeless French Dishes and Their Stories
item.description: Published by CNN Travel, this article explores 20 essential dishes that define French cuisine and its culinary traditions. It begins by tracing the origins of French cooking to the 17th century and hi...

item.title: Selection of Political Cartoons Published on 13 April 2026
item.description: The article from The Age titled 'Best of cartoons, April 13, 2026' is part of the outlet’s regular feature showcasing a curated collection of political and editorial cartoons that reflect the major st...

item.title: Political factions test strength in Emurua Dikirr ahead of by-election
item.description: The Emurua Dikirr by-election in Narok County is shaping up to be a major political test for President William Ruto and his deputy Rigathi Gachagua. The mini poll, triggered by recent political develo...

item.title: DIG initiates probe into alleged armed robbery incident on Shah Faisal Bridge
item.description: On Sunday, East DIG Dr Farrukh Ali instructed an inquiry into reports of an armed robbery on Shah Faisal Bridge in Karachi after a video circulating on social media appeared to show the incident. Acco...

item.title: How the Trump administration is dismantling the US federal government and deepening global crises
item.description: The article argues that the United States is undergoing a severe internal crisis under the current Trump‑era administration, with almost every branch and department of the federal government being sys...

item.title: Iran’s President Discusses Middle East Situation with Putin Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: According to Iranian state media and reports from The Wall Street Journal, Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi held a phone conversation with Russian President Vladimir Putin to discuss recent development...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs secure 2-0 win over TS Galaxy amid heavy rain and floodlight outage
item.description: At FNB Stadium, Kaizer Chiefs continued their strong run by defeating TS Galaxy 2-0, marking their fourth consecutive league win for the season and cementing third place on the table. Flavio Silva and...

item.title: Nigerian Police in Kwara Complain of Hunger and Lack of Allowances While Fighting Lakurawa Terrorists
item.description: Naija police officers wey dem send from different states dey fight Lakurawa terrorists for Kwara don dey complain say dem never collect dem duty allowances for the past three months. These officers, w...

item.title: Vijay Emphasises Bipartisan Contest in Tamil Nadu Assembly Elections, Outlines Governance Plans
item.description: TVK leader Vijay has clarified that the Tamil Nadu assembly elections should not be seen as a multi-party contest, asserting that the main competition is strictly between his party, TVK, and the rulin...

item.title: Five critically injured in multi-vehicle crash on Tamborine Mountain Road, Queensland
item.description: A serious multi-vehicle collision occurred on Tamborine Mountain Road in Queensland's Scenic Rim on Sunday morning, leaving five people fighting for their lives. The crash involved two cars and a moto...

item.title: South African Businesses Face Rising Risks Amid Global Instability
item.description: Spiros Fatouro's analysis highlights the escalating risks facing businesses, particularly in South Africa, as we approach 2026. The article emphasizes that the ability of leaders to anticipate and res...

item.title: Reform UK deputy leader Richard Tice addresses £91,000 tax oversight by his company
item.description: A controversy has emerged regarding the tax payments of Quidnet REIT Limited, the property company founded and owned by Reform UK deputy leader Richard Tice. According to reports, the company failed t...

item.title: Political Analysts Discuss Kamala Harris’s Potential 2028 Presidential Run
item.description: CNN political commentators and Democratic Congressman Eugene Vindman discussed the possibility of Kamala Harris running for president in 2028. Jamal Simmons emphasized that Harris should focus on her ...
